entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: Pod borer insect tested for response to flavonoids

entities.name: SPODOPTERA LITURA
entities.description: Tobacco caterpillar insect tested for response to flavonoids

entities.name: FLAVONOIDS
entities.description: Plant secondary metabolites used to test effects on insect growth and survival

entities.name: CHLOROGENIC ACID
entities.description: A specific flavonoid tested for its effect on insect larvae

entities.name: QUERCETIN
entities.description: A specific flavonoid tested for its effect on insect larvae

entities.name: RUTIN
entities.description: A specific flavonoid that significantly inhibited H. armigera and S. litura

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The physical development and size increase of the insect larvae

entities.name: SURVIVAL
entities.description: The ability of the insect larvae to remain alive

entities.name: DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The progression of insects through larval, pupal, and adult stages

entities.name: MORTALITY
entities.description: The rate of death among the insect larvae and pupae

entities.name: MOTH EMERGENCE
entities.description: The process of adult moths emerging from the pupal stage

entities.name: PROGENY PRODUCTION
entities.description: The ability of adult moths to produce offspring

entities.name: MOLTING
entities.description: The physiological process of shedding the exoskeleton during development

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL DIETS
entities.description: The nutrient medium provided to the larvae during the study

relationships.description: inhibits growth and survival in higher concentrations
causes arrested larval development and pupal mortality
allows moth emergence but prevents progeny production

interferes with physiological processes during molting
